close_reason: Implemented ClusterBootstrap.Discovery with Internal.Id centralization and comprehensive tests
description:
At boot, a bedrock node should read ClusterBootstrap from ObjectStorage to determine if it is a coordinator.

## Boot Sequence

1. Read ClusterBootstrap from ObjectStorage
2. Check if this node is in the coordinators list
3. If yes → start Coordinator process
4. Coordinators form Raft quorum
5. Leader starts Director
6. Director locks logs using epoch

## First Boot (No ClusterBootstrap Exists)

Single-node, single-coordinator system creates initial ClusterBootstrap.

## Schema Changes Required

Add `coordinators` field to ClusterBootstrap FlatBuffer schema:

```fbs
table CoordinatorInfo {
  node: string;
}

table ClusterBootstrap {
  cluster_id: string;
  epoch: ulong;
  logs: [LogInfo];
  coordinators: [CoordinatorInfo];  // NEW
}
```

## Key Files

- priv/schemas/cluster_bootstrap.fbs
- lib/bedrock/internal/cluster_supervisor.ex
- lib/bedrock/system_keys/cluster_bootstrap.ex
title: Node reads ClusterBootstrap at boot to determine coordinator role
